maxItemsPerCategory.title: Max Items Per Category
maxItemsPerCategory.description: Safety cap per category (0 for unlimited)

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Vehicle search keyword (e.g. Tesla Model 3). When set, searches GovPlanet instead of scraping category pages.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: URL to POST results summary to on completion
